These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings. (../QAT-Model/transfer.cpp:11:14)

Multiple burst writes of length 10 and bit width 32 in loop 'STORE_O'(../QAT-Model/transfer.cpp:29:14) has been inferred on bundle 'gmem'.
